#!/usr/bin/env python3
import argparse
import json
import subprocess
import sys
from pathlib import Path

BUILD = Path.home() / 'clawd' / 'skills' / 'yumfu' / 'scripts' / 'build_reentry_context.py'


def main():
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description='Render a concise continue-time re-entry prompt for YumFu')
    parser.add_argument('--user-id', required=True)
    parser.add_argument('--universe', required=True)
    parser.add_argument('--recent-text', action='append', default=[])
    parser.add_argument('--recent-texts-json', default=None)
    args = parser.parse_args()

    cmd = ['python3', str(BUILD), '--user-id', args.user_id, '--universe', args.universe]
    for text in args.recent_text:
        cmd.extend(['--recent-text', text])
    if args.recent_texts_json:
        cmd.extend(['--recent-texts-json', args.recent_texts_json])

    proc = subprocess.run(cmd, capture_output=True, text=True)
    if proc.returncode != 0:
        print(proc.stderr.strip() or proc.stdout.strip(), file=sys.stderr)
        sys.exit(proc.returncode)

    data = json.loads(proc.stdout)
    lang = data.get('preferred_language') or 'en'
    summary = data.get('last_daily_summary')
    hooks = data.get('pending_hooks') or []
    character = data.get('character_name') or 'the player'
    location = data.get('location') or 'the current scene'
    quest = data.get('active_quest') or 'the active quest'

    if lang == 'zh':
        text = f"你回来时，{location} 的局势已经轻轻变了。{summary or '你离开的这段时间，附近出现了新的风声。'}\n\n你现在仍在推进「{quest}」。先别做功课，直接接回现场。"
        if hooks:
            text += "\n\n最自然的下一步：\n" + "\n".join(f"- {h}" for h in hooks[:2])
    else:
        text = f"When {character} returns to {location}, the scene has shifted slightly: {summary or 'something nearby changed while you were away.'}\n\nYou are still in the middle of '{quest}'. Do not dump lore; pull the player straight back into the scene."
        if hooks:
            text += "\n\nMost natural next moves:\n" + "\n".join(f"- {h}" for h in hooks[:2])

    print(json.dumps({'success': True, 'preferred_language': lang, 'text': text}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))


if __name__ == '__main__':
    main()

#!/usr/bin/env python3
import argparse
import json
import subprocess
import sys
from pathlib import Path

PREPARE = Path.home() / 'clawd' / 'skills' / 'yumfu' / 'scripts' / 'daily_evolution_prepare.py'
APPLY = Path.home() / 'clawd' / 'skills' / 'yumfu' / 'scripts' / 'apply_daily_evolution.py'


def main():
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description='Run YumFu daily evolution and emit a ready-to-use agent payload')
    parser.add_argument('--user-id', required=True)
    parser.add_argument('--universe', required=True)
    parser.add_argument('--channel', default='telegram')
    parser.add_argument('--target', default=None)
    parser.add_argument('--apply-from-json', default=None,
                        help='Optional path to a JSON file containing generated evolution output to write to sidecar')
    args = parser.parse_args()

    if args.apply_from_json:
        payload = json.loads(Path(args.apply_from_json).read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
        summary = payload['summary']
        story_text = payload['story_text']
        severity = payload.get('severity', 'minor')
        image_prompt = payload.get('image_prompt', '')
        hooks = payload.get('pending_hooks', [])
        meta = payload.get('sidecar_meta', {})
        proc = subprocess.run([
            'python3', str(APPLY),
            '--user-id', args.user_id,
            '--universe', args.universe,
            '--summary', summary,
            '--story-text', story_text,
            '--severity', severity,
            '--image-prompt', image_prompt,
            '--hooks-json', json.dumps(hooks, ensure_ascii=False),
            '--meta-json', json.dumps(meta, ensure_ascii=False),
        ], capture_output=True, text=True)
        if proc.returncode != 0:
            print(proc.stderr.strip() or proc.stdout.strip(), file=sys.stderr)
            sys.exit(proc.returncode)
        print(proc.stdout)
        return

    prep = subprocess.run([
        'python3', str(PREPARE),
        '--user-id', args.user_id,
        '--universe', args.universe,
    ], capture_output=True, text=True)
    if prep.returncode != 0:
        print(prep.stderr.strip() or prep.stdout.strip(), file=sys.stderr)
        sys.exit(prep.returncode)

    prep_obj = json.loads(prep.stdout)
    context = prep_obj['context']

    instruction = {
        'purpose': 'Use this payload in an agent turn to generate one safe daily YumFu evolution update.',
        'channel': args.channel,
        'target': args.target,
        'agent_task': {
            'generate': {
                'story_text': '100-220 words, concise, scene-forward, easy re-entry hook at the end',
                'summary': 'one-sentence summary',
                'severity': 'minor|medium|major',
                'image_prompt': 'one strong scene prompt matched to the update',
                'pending_hooks': ['1-3 short hooks for next active play'],
                'sidecar_meta': {
                    'rumor_threads': ['soft rumors'],
                    'faction_movements': ['soft world changes'],
                    'npc_watchlist': ['watch targets']
                }
            },
            'must_not_do': [
                'do not modify the main save directly',
                'do not kill the player offline',
                'do not auto-finish the main story',
                'do not send a separate report-generated message'
            ],
            'after_generation': [
                'generate one image from image_prompt',
                'send one in-world message with the image',
                'write the generated result to a temporary JSON file',
                'call run_daily_evolution.py --apply-from-json <file> to persist the sidecar state'
            ]
        },
        'context': context
    }

    print(json.dumps({'success': True, 'payload': instruction}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))


if __name__ == '__main__':
    main()

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
YumFu Game Save Script
统一的存档保存工具 - 避免AI猜测存档格式

Usage:
    uv run ~/clawd/skills/yumfu/scripts/save_game.py \
        --user-id 1309815719 \
        --universe xiaoao \
        --data '{"character": {"name": "小虾米", "level": 1, ...}, ...}'

Or pipe JSON:
    echo '{"character": {...}}' | uv run save_game.py --user-id 123 --universe xiaoao
"""

import json
import os
import sys
import argparse
from pathlib import Path
from datetime import datetime


def save_game(user_id: str, universe: str, data: dict, backup: bool = True) -> dict:
    """
    保存游戏进度到标准路径
    
    Args:
        user_id: Telegram/Platform user ID
        universe: World name (xiaoao, harry-potter, warrior-cats, etc.)
        data: Complete save data dict
        backup: Create timestamped backup before overwriting
    
    Returns:
        {
            "success": bool,
            "save_path": str,
            "backup_path": str|None,
            "error": str|None
        }
    """
    # Standard save directory
    save_dir = Path.home() / "clawd" / "memory" / "yumfu" / "saves" / universe
    save_path = save_dir / f"user-{user_id}.json"
    
    # Create directory if needed
    save_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    
    # Validate data
    if not isinstance(data, dict):
        return {"success": False, "error": "Data must be a JSON object"}
    
    # Add metadata
    if "user_id" not in data:
        data["user_id"] = user_id
    if "universe" not in data:
        data["universe"] = universe
    if "version" not in data:
        data["version"] = 2  # Current save format version
    
    data["last_saved"] = datetime.now().isoformat()
    
    # Backup existing save
    backup_path = None
    if backup and save_path.exists():
        backup_dir = Path.home() / "clawd" / "memory" / "yumfu" / "backups"
        backup_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
        timestamp = datetime.now().strftime("%Y%m%d-%H%M%S")
        backup_path = backup_dir / f"user-{user_id}-{universe}-{timestamp}.json"
        
        try:
            with open(save_path, 'r') as f:
                old_data = json.load(f)
            with open(backup_path, 'w') as f:
                json.dump(old_data, f, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"⚠️ Backup failed (non-fatal): {e}", file=sys.stderr)
    
    # Write new save
    try:
        with open(save_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            json.dump(data, f, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)
        
        # Verify write
        if not save_path.exists():
            return {
                "success": False,
                "error": "Save file write succeeded but file doesn't exist!"
            }
        
        # Verify content
        with open(save_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            verified = json.load(f)
        
        return {
            "success": True,
            "save_path": str(save_path),
            "backup_path": str(backup_path) if backup_path else None,
            "character_name": verified.get("character", {}).get("name", "Unknown"),
            "level": verified.get("character", {}).get("level", "?"),
        }
        
    except Exception as e:
        # Emergency fallback: try temp directory
        fallback_path = Path("/tmp") / f"yumfu-emergency-{user_id}-{universe}.json"
        try:
            with open(fallback_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                json.dump(data, f, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)
            
            return {
                "success": False,
                "error": f"Primary save failed: {e}. Emergency save at {fallback_path}",
                "fallback_path": str(fallback_path)
            }
        except Exception as e2:
            return {
                "success": False,
                "error": f"Complete save failure: {e}. Fallback also failed: {e2}"
            }


def main():
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="YumFu unified save script")
    parser.add_argument("--user-id", required=True, help="User ID (Telegram/Platform)")
    parser.add_argument("--universe", required=True, 
                       choices=["xiaoao", "harry-potter", "warrior-cats", "lotr", "game-of-thrones", "yitian", "sengoku"],
                       help="Game world/universe")
    parser.add_argument("--data", help="JSON data as string (optional if using stdin)")
    parser.add_argument("--no-backup", action="store_true", help="Skip backup of existing save")
    parser.add_argument("--quiet", action="store_true", help="Only output JSON result")
    
    args = parser.parse_args()
    
    # Get data from --data or stdin
    if args.data:
        try:
            data = json.loads(args.data)
        except json.JSONDecodeError as e:
            print(json.dumps({"success": False, "error": f"Invalid JSON: {e}"}))
            sys.exit(1)
    else:
        # Read from stdin
        if sys.stdin.isatty():
            print("Error: No --data provided and stdin is empty", file=sys.stderr)
            print("Usage: echo '{...}' | save_game.py --user-id 123 --universe xiaoao", file=sys.stderr)
            sys.exit(1)
        
        try:
            data = json.load(sys.stdin)
        except json.JSONDecodeError as e:
            print(json.dumps({"success": False, "error": f"Invalid JSON from stdin: {e}"}))
            sys.exit(1)
    
    # Execute save
    result = save_game(args.user_id, args.universe, data, backup=not args.no_backup)
    
    # Output
    if args.quiet:
        print(json.dumps(result))
    else:
        if result["success"]:
            print(f"✅ Game saved successfully!")
            print(f"📁 Path: {result['save_path']}")
            if result.get("backup_path"):
                print(f"💾 Backup: {result['backup_path']}")
            print(f"👤 Character: {result.get('character_name')} (Lv.{result.get('level')})")
        else:
            print(f"❌ Save failed: {result['error']}", file=sys.stderr)
            if result.get("fallback_path"):
                print(f"⚠️ Emergency save: {result['fallback_path']}", file=sys.stderr)
            sys.exit(1)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
Session Logger for YumFu - V3 (OPTIONAL - Privacy-Aware)
Tracks gameplay conversations for storybook generation.

⚠️ PRIVACY NOTICE:
This logger stores complete gameplay conversations (player input + AI responses).
To disable logging, set environment variable: YUMFU_NO_LOGGING=1

V3 adds a dual-track format:
- raw player / AI text
- storybook-ready player / AI prose

Usage:
    from scripts.session_logger import log_turn

    # Logging is automatically disabled if YUMFU_NO_LOGGING=1
    log_turn(
        user_id="YOUR_USER_ID",
        universe="warrior-cats",
        player_input="/yumfu look",
        ai_response="You see the ThunderClan camp...",
        image="tumpaw-camp-20260403.png",
        player_storybook="You lifted your head and took in the ThunderClan camp in full.",
        ai_storybook="The ThunderClan camp opened before you, alive with movement and evening voices."
    )
"""

import json
import os
from pathlib import Path
from datetime import datetime
from typing import Optional, Dict, Any


# Privacy control: Check if logging is disabled
def _is_logging_disabled() -> bool:
    """Check if user has disabled session logging for privacy"""
    return os.getenv("YUMFU_NO_LOGGING", "0") == "1"


def _normalize_whitespace(text: str) -> str:
    return " ".join((text or "").strip().split())


def _default_player_storybook(player_input: str) -> str:
    raw = _normalize_whitespace(player_input)
    if not raw:
        return ""
    lowered = raw.lower()
    if lowered.startswith('/yumfu '):
        raw = raw[7:].strip()
    elif lowered == '/yumfu':
        raw = 'continued the adventure'

    if raw in {'A', 'B', 'C', 'D', '1', '2', '3', '4'}:
        return f"You chose option {raw}."
    if len(raw) <= 4 and raw.upper() == raw and raw.isalpha():
        return f"You chose {raw}."
    return raw[:1].upper() + raw[1:] if raw else raw


def _default_ai_storybook(ai_response: str) -> str:
    return _normalize_whitespace(ai_response)


class SessionLogger:
    def __init__(self, user_id: str, universe: str, session_id: str = None):
        # Check if logging is disabled
        if _is_logging_disabled():
            self.disabled = True
            return
        
        self.disabled = False
        self.user_id = user_id
        self.universe = universe
        self.session_id = session_id or datetime.now().strftime("%Y%m%d-%H%M%S")
        
        # Paths
        self.base_path = Path.home() / "clawd/memory/yumfu"
        self.session_dir = self.base_path / "sessions" / universe / f"user-{user_id}"
        self.session_file = self.session_dir / f"session-{self.session_id}.jsonl"
        
        # Create directories
        self.session_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
        
        # Session metadata
        self.start_time = datetime.now().isoformat()
        
    def log_turn(
        self,
        player_input: str,
        ai_response: str,
        image: Optional[str] = None,
        player_storybook: Optional[str] = None,
        ai_storybook: Optional[str] = None,
        metadata: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None,
    ):
        """
        Log a complete game turn (player action + AI response + optional image)

        Args:
            player_input: What the player typed (e.g., "/yumfu look")
            ai_response: The AI's narrative response
            image: Optional image filename if generated this turn
            player_storybook: Optional book-style retelling of the player's action
            ai_storybook: Optional book-style retelling of the AI scene text
            metadata: Optional extra turn metadata
        """
        if self.disabled:
            return  # No-op if logging disabled

        entry = {
            "timestamp": datetime.now().isoformat(),
            "type": "turn",
            "player": player_input,
            "player_storybook": player_storybook or _default_player_storybook(player_input),
            "ai": ai_response,
            "ai_storybook": ai_storybook or _default_ai_storybook(ai_response),
            "image": image,
            "metadata": metadata or {}
        }
        self._append_to_file(entry)
    
    def log_event(self, event: str, image: Optional[str] = None, metadata: dict = None):
        """Log a story event (location change, achievement, etc.)"""
        if self.disabled:
            return
        entry = {
            "timestamp": datetime.now().isoformat(),
            "type": "event",
            "content": event,
            "image": image,
            "metadata": metadata or {}
        }
        self._append_to_file(entry)
    
    def log_dialogue(self, speaker: str, text: str, image: Optional[str] = None):
        """Log NPC dialogue"""
        if self.disabled:
            return
        entry = {
            "timestamp": datetime.now().isoformat(),
            "type": "dialogue",
            "speaker": speaker,
            "content": text,
            "image": image
        }
        self._append_to_file(entry)
    
    def log_image(self, filename: str, description: str = ""):
        """Log an image generation"""
        if self.disabled:
            return
        entry = {
            "timestamp": datetime.now().isoformat(),
            "type": "image",
            "filename": filename,
            "description": description
        }
        self._append_to_file(entry)
    
    def _append_to_file(self, entry: dict):
        """Append entry to JSONL file"""
        if self.disabled:
            return
        with open(self.session_file, 'a', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            f.write(json.dumps(entry, ensure_ascii=False) + '\n')
    
    def finalize(self):
        """Create session summary"""
        summary = {
            "user_id": self.user_id,
            "universe": self.universe,
            "session_id": self.session_id,
            "start_time": self.start_time,
            "end_time": datetime.now().isoformat()
        }
        
        summary_file = self.session_dir / f"session-{self.session_id}-summary.json"
        with open(summary_file, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            json.dump(summary, f, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)
        
        return self.session_file


def get_current_session(user_id: str, universe: str) -> SessionLogger:
    """
    Get or create current session logger.
    Sessions expire after 2 hours of inactivity.
    """
    session_dir = Path.home() / "clawd/memory/yumfu/sessions" / universe / f"user-{user_id}"
    
    if not session_dir.exists():
        return SessionLogger(user_id, universe)
    
    # Find most recent session
    sessions = sorted(session_dir.glob("session-*.jsonl"), key=lambda p: p.stat().st_mtime, reverse=True)
    
    if not sessions:
        return SessionLogger(user_id, universe)
    
    # Check if most recent is still active (within 2 hours)
    latest = sessions[0]
    age_hours = (datetime.now().timestamp() - latest.stat().st_mtime) / 3600
    
    if age_hours < 2:
        # Resume existing session
        session_id = latest.stem.replace("session-", "")
        return SessionLogger(user_id, universe, session_id=session_id)
    else:
        # Start new session
        return SessionLogger(user_id, universe)


def log_turn(
    user_id: str,
    universe: str,
    player_input: str,
    ai_response: str,
    image: Optional[str] = None,
    player_storybook: Optional[str] = None,
    ai_storybook: Optional[str] = None,
    metadata: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None,
):
    """
    Convenience function to log a complete turn.
    Automatically manages sessions (creates/resumes).

    Example:
        log_turn(
            user_id="YOUR_USER_ID",
            universe="warrior-cats",
            player_input="/yumfu look",
            ai_response="You see the ThunderClan camp bustling with activity...",
            image="tumpaw-camp-20260403.png",
            player_storybook="You paused to study the camp around you.",
            ai_storybook="The ThunderClan camp bustled with activity around the fresh-kill pile."
        )
    """
    logger = get_current_session(user_id, universe)
    logger.log_turn(
        player_input,
        ai_response,
        image=image,
        player_storybook=player_storybook,
        ai_storybook=ai_storybook,
        metadata=metadata,
    )
    return logger.session_file


def log_image_only(user_id: str, universe: str, filename: str, description: str = ""):
    """
    Log an image generation (when no dialogue happens in same turn)
    """
    logger = get_current_session(user_id, universe)
    logger.log_image(filename, description)
    return logger.session_file

#!/usr/bin/env python3
import argparse
import json
from datetime import datetime, timedelta
from pathlib import Path


def evolution_path(user_id: str, universe: str) -> Path:
    return Path.home() / 'clawd' / 'memory' / 'yumfu' / 'evolution' / universe / f'user-{user_id}.json'


def main():
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description='Enable/disable YumFu daily evolution in sidecar state (safe mode)')
    parser.add_argument('--user-id', required=True)
    parser.add_argument('--universe', required=True)
    parser.add_argument('--enabled', required=True, choices=['true', 'false'])
    parser.add_argument('--channel', default='telegram')
    parser.add_argument('--cadence', default='daily')
    parser.add_argument('--cron-id', default=None)
    args = parser.parse_args()

    path = evolution_path(args.user_id, args.universe)
    path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

    existing = {}
    if path.exists():
        try:
            existing = json.loads(path.read_text())
        except Exception:
            existing = {}

    enabled = args.enabled == 'true'
    now = datetime.now()
    state = {
        'user_id': args.user_id,
        'universe': args.universe,
        'enabled': enabled,
        'channel': args.channel,
        'cadence': args.cadence,
        'cron_id': args.cron_id,
        'last_tick_at': existing.get('last_tick_at'),
        'next_tick_at': (now + timedelta(days=1)).isoformat() if enabled else None,
        'last_summary': existing.get('last_summary'),
        'last_story_text': existing.get('last_story_text'),
        'last_severity': existing.get('last_severity'),
        'last_image_prompt': existing.get('last_image_prompt'),
        'pending_hooks': existing.get('pending_hooks', []),
        'meta': existing.get('meta', {}),
        'history': existing.get('history', [])
    }

    path.write_text(json.dumps(state, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')
    print(json.dumps({
        'success': True,
        'sidecar_path': str(path),
        'enabled': enabled,
        'channel': args.channel,
        'cadence': args.cadence,
        'next_tick_at': state['next_tick_at']
    }, ensure_ascii=False))


if __name__ == '__main__':
    main()

#!/usr/bin/env python3
import argparse
import json
import sys
from pathlib import Path
from datetime import datetime


def load_save(user_id: str, universe: str):
    save_path = Path.home() / 'clawd' / 'memory' / 'yumfu' / 'saves' / universe / f'user-{user_id}.json'
    if not save_path.exists():
        raise FileNotFoundError(f'No save found: {save_path}')
    with open(save_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        return save_path, json.load(f)


def main():
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description='Enable/disable YumFu storybook tracking per save')
    parser.add_argument('--user-id', required=True)
    parser.add_argument('--universe', required=True)
    parser.add_argument('--enabled', required=True, choices=['true', 'false'])
    parser.add_argument('--auto-refresh-html', default='true', choices=['true', 'false'])
    parser.add_argument('--delivery', default='on-request', choices=['on-request', 'final-only', 'milestones'])
    args = parser.parse_args()

    save_path, data = load_save(args.user_id, args.universe)
    tracking = data.get('storybook_tracking', {})
    tracking.update({
        'enabled': args.enabled == 'true',
        'auto_refresh_html': args.auto_refresh_html == 'true',
        'delivery': args.delivery,
        'last_updated': datetime.now().isoformat(),
    })
    data['storybook_tracking'] = tracking

    with open(save_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        json.dump(data, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
        f.write('\n')

    print(json.dumps({
        'success': True,
        'save_path': str(save_path),
        'storybook_tracking': tracking,
    }, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))


if __name__ == '__main__':
    main()

#!/usr/bin/env python3
import argparse
import json
import subprocess
import sys
from pathlib import Path

INIT_SAVE = Path.home() / 'clawd' / 'skills' / 'yumfu' / 'scripts' / 'init_sengoku_save.py'
HANDLE_DE = Path.home() / 'clawd' / 'skills' / 'yumfu' / 'scripts' / 'handle_daily_evolution_choice.py'
RENDER_OPENING = Path.home() / 'clawd' / 'skills' / 'yumfu' / 'scripts' / 'render_sengoku_opening.py'
WORLD_PATH = Path.home() / 'clawd' / 'skills' / 'yumfu' / 'worlds' / 'sengoku.json'


def load_world():
    return json.loads(WORLD_PATH.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))


def pick(items, item_id, key='id'):
    for item in items:
        if item.get(key) == item_id:
            return item
    raise KeyError(item_id)


def run(cmd):
    proc = subprocess.run(cmd, capture_output=True, text=True)
    if proc.returncode != 0:
        raise RuntimeError(proc.stderr.strip() or proc.stdout.strip())
    return json.loads(proc.stdout)


def build_opening(world, name, role, faction, scenario):
    opening_text = (
        f"乱世的风先吹到京都，又吹到堺港、甲斐、对马与每一座还没烧干净的城下町。\n\n"
        f"你叫{name}。你不是史书上已经写好的名字，而是刚刚踏进这场大乱的人。"
        f"你现在的身份是【{role['name_zh']}】，站在【{faction['name_zh']}】这一边，却未必永远只替这一边活。\n\n"
        f"今夜的开场是：{scenario['name_zh']}。\n"
        f"{scenario['hook']}\n\n"
        f"你很清楚，在这个时代，最先到手的从来不是天下，而是：一封信、一批粮、一门炮、一个肯替你去死的人。"
        f"而你要做的第一件事，不是空想大业，是先把眼前这一局吃下来。"
    )

    image_prompt = (
        f"Sengoku Chaos opening scene, {scenario['name_zh']}, protagonist {name}, role {role['name_zh']}, faction {faction['name_zh']}, "
        f"{scenario['hook']}, Japanese ukiyo-e woodblock print style, bold ink outlines, textured washi paper, flat layered colors, lacquer armor, muddy streets, banners, hidden intrigue, matchlocks and power struggle"
    )

    choices = [
        "先看清现场里谁真正有权",
        "先盯住最可能坏你事的人",
        "先拿到第一份能立威的资源",
        "先按你的路子自己开口布局"
    ]

    return {
        'opening_text': opening_text,
        'image_prompt': image_prompt,
        'choices': choices
    }


def main():
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description='Initialize and render a playable YumFu Sengoku Chaos opening')
    parser.add_argument('--user-id', required=True)
    parser.add_argument('--name', required=True)
    parser.add_argument('--role', required=True)
    parser.add_argument('--faction', required=True)
    parser.add_argument('--scenario', required=True)
    parser.add_argument('--language', default='zh')
    parser.add_argument('--daily-evolution', choices=['yes', 'no'], default='no')
    parser.add_argument('--target', default=None)
    parser.add_argument('--channel', default='telegram')
    parser.add_argument('--time', default='10:00')
    parser.add_argument('--tz', default='America/Los_Angeles')
    args = parser.parse_args()

    world = load_world()
    role = pick(world['playable_roles'], args.role)
    faction = pick(world['factions'], args.faction)
    scenario = pick(world['starting_scenarios'], args.scenario)

    save_result = run([
        'python3', str(INIT_SAVE),
        '--user-id', args.user_id,
        '--name', args.name,
        '--role', args.role,
        '--faction', args.faction,
        '--scenario', args.scenario,
        '--language', args.language,
    ])

    de_result = None
    if args.target:
        de_result = run([
            'python3', str(HANDLE_DE),
            '--user-id', args.user_id,
            '--universe', 'sengoku',
            '--target', args.target,
            '--choice', args.daily_evolution,
            '--channel', args.channel,
            '--time', args.time,
            '--tz', args.tz,
        ])

    opening = build_opening(world, args.name, role, faction, scenario)
    rendered_opening = run([
        'python3', str(RENDER_OPENING), '--user-id', args.user_id
    ])

    print(json.dumps({
        'success': True,
        'world': world['name_zh'],
        'save_result': save_result,
        'daily_evolution': de_result,
        'opening': opening,
        'rendered_opening': rendered_opening,
        'daily_evolution_pitch_zh': world.get('daily_evolution_pitch_zh')
    }, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))


if __name__ == '__main__':
    main()
files.scripts/turn_delivery_state.py:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
Per-turn delivery state for YumFu.
Prevents duplicate sends such as:
- image first, then image+caption again
- multiple image sends for one turn
- multiple TTS bubbles for one turn
"""

from __future__ import annotations

import argparse
import json
from datetime import datetime
from pathlib import Path

STATE_ROOT = Path.home() / 'clawd' / 'memory' / 'yumfu' / 'delivery-state'


def state_path(user_id: str, universe: str, turn_id: str) -> Path:
    return STATE_ROOT / universe / f'user-{user_id}' / f'{turn_id}.json'


def load(user_id: str, universe: str, turn_id: str) -> dict:
    p = state_path(user_id, universe, turn_id)
    if not p.exists():
        return {
            'turn_id': turn_id,
            'user_id': user_id,
            'universe': universe,
            'created_at': datetime.now().isoformat(),
            'main_text_sent': False,
            'image_sent': False,
            'tts_sent': False,
            'image_mode': None,
        }
    return json.loads(p.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))


def save(payload: dict) -> Path:
    p = state_path(payload['user_id'], payload['universe'], payload['turn_id'])
    p.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    p.write_text(json.dumps(payload, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
    return p


def main() -> None:
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description='Manage YumFu turn delivery state')
    parser.add_argument('--user-id', required=True)
    parser.add_argument('--universe', required=True)
    parser.add_argument('--turn-id', required=True)
    parser.add_argument('--mark', choices=['main_text_sent', 'image_sent', 'tts_sent'])
    parser.add_argument('--image-mode', choices=['caption', 'fallback-image-only'])
    args = parser.parse_args()

    payload = load(args.user_id, args.universe, args.turn_id)
    if args.mark:
        payload[args.mark] = True
        payload['updated_at'] = datetime.now().isoformat()
    if args.image_mode:
        payload['image_mode'] = args.image_mode
        payload['updated_at'] = datetime.now().isoformat()
    path = save(payload)
    print(json.dumps({'success': True, 'path': str(path), 'state': payload}, ensure_ascii=False))


if __name__ == '__main__':
    main()

#!/bin/bash
# YumFu Save File Upgrader - Adds v2.1 compatibility fields

echo "🔧 Upgrading YumFu save files for v2 world configs..."

# Xiaoao saves - add new fields if missing
for save in ~/clawd/memory/yumfu/saves/xiaoao/*.json; do
  if [ -f "$save" ]; then
    echo "📝 Processing: $(basename $save)"
    # Backup
    cp "$save" "$save.bak"
    
    # Add charm attribute if missing (using jq)
    if command -v jq &> /dev/null; then
      jq '.character.attributes.charm //= 50 | 
          .character.equipped //= {"weapon": (.inventory[] | select(.type=="weapon") | .name), "armor": (.inventory[] | select(.type=="armor") | .name)} |
          .warrior_code_adherence //= 80 |
          .gameplay_chapter //= 1' "$save" > "$save.tmp" && mv "$save.tmp" "$save"
      echo "  ✅ Added v2.1 fields"
    else
      echo "  ⚠️  jq not found, skipping automatic upgrade"
    fi
  fi
done

echo "✅ Xiaoao江湖 saves upgraded"

# Harry Potter saves (if any exist)
if [ -d ~/clawd/memory/yumfu/saves/harry-potter ]; then
  for save in ~/clawd/memory/yumfu/saves/harry-potter/*.json; do
    if [ -f "$save" ]; then
      echo "📝 Processing HP: $(basename $save)"
      cp "$save" "$save.bak"
      # Add new HP v2 fields
      if command -v jq &> /dev/null; then
        jq '.character.school_year //= 1 |
            .character.house //= "gryffindor" |
            .character.attributes.courage //= 50 |
            .character.attributes.loyalty //= 50 |
            .exam_scores //= {} |
            .friendships //= {} |
            .quidditch_position //= null' "$save" > "$save.tmp" && mv "$save.tmp" "$save"
        echo "  ✅ Added HP v2.1 fields"
      fi
    fi
  done
  echo "✅ Harry Potter saves upgraded"
fi

echo ""
echo "🎮 All save files upgraded successfully!"
echo "📦 Backups created with .bak extension"
files.worlds/LOTR_EXPANSION.md:
# LOTR World Expansion - Gollum & Equipment

This file extends the Lord of the Rings world with detailed Gollum/Sméagol mechanics and expanded equipment.

## 🧟 Gollum / Sméagol - Complete Profile

### Basic Info
- **Original Name**: Sméagol
- **Titles**: Stinker, Slinker, The Ring's Slave
- **Race**: Hobbit (Stoor, corrupted)
- **Age**: ~589 years old
- **Corruption Level**: 99/100

### Personality Split

**Gollum (Dark Side)**:
- Cruel, cunning, obsessed, treacherous
- Hissing voice, refers to Ring as "my precious"
- Goals: Reclaim Ring, murder Frodo, return to caves

**Sméagol (Original Personality)**:
- Fearful, pathetic, lonely, once-innocent
- Whiny voice, calls Frodo "master"
- Goals: Serve master, be free of Gollum, redemption

### Backstory
- **Origin**: Stoor hobbit from Gladden Fields
- **Ring Acquisition**: Strangled cousin Déagol for Ring on his birthday (TA 2463)
- **Years with Ring**: 478 years before losing it to Bilbo
- **Exile**: Fled to Misty Mountains after murdering grandmother
- **Torture**: Captured by Sauron, revealed "Shire" and "Baggins"
- **Current State**: Follows Frodo, split between serving and betraying

### Appearance
- **Height**: Small (hobbit-sized but hunched)
- **Build**: Emaciated, skeletal
- **Skin**: Pale, slimy, corpse-like
- **Eyes**: Large, luminous, pale green (cat-like in dark)
- **Teeth**: Sharp, few remaining
- **Movement**: Creeps on all fours, hisses

### Famous Dialogue

**Calling Frodo ("Master")**:
- "Master! Master!"
- "Nice master, kind master..."
- "What does master want? Sméagol helps master..."

**Gollum Rage**:
- "Filthy hobbitses! Tricksy! False!"
- "We hates it! Hates it forever!"
- "Thief! Baggins! We hates it!"
- "My precious... they stole it from us!"

**Sméagol Pleading**:
- "Not listening, not listening to the liar!"
- "Go away! Leave me alone, Gollum!"
- "We promised to serve the master of the Precious..."
- "Sméagol is free! Free!"

**About the Ring**:
- "The Precious... it came to us, yes it did..."
- "We wants it, we needs it! Must have the precious!"
- "Lost! Lost! Curse the Baggins, curse him!"

**Guiding**:
- "Follow Sméagol, yes. He knows the way..."
- "Secret ways, dark ways, safe ways..."
- "Not the Black Gate! No, no! Another way... Sméagol knows..."

### Relationship Mechanics

**Trust Meter**: 0-100 (starts at 20)
- **Sméagol Dominant**: Trust ≥60
- **Gollum Dominant**: Trust ≤30

**Trust Gain (+)**:
- Show kindness: +5
- Share food: +8
- Defend from Sam's anger: +10
- Call him Sméagol: +3
- Listen to his stories: +7

**Trust Loss (-)**:
- Threaten violence: -10
- Call him villain: -8
- Starve him: -15
- Use Ring near him: -20

### Redemption Path (RARE)
- **Requirement**: Trust ≥80 by Chapter 8
- **Trigger**: Frodo shows mercy at Mount Doom
- **Outcome**: Sméagol fights Gollum internally, helps destroy Ring willingly
- **Alternate Ending**: Sméagol lives (very rare, requires perfect kindness route)

### Betrayal Path (Canonical)
- **Trigger**: Trust ≤30 by Chapter 7
- **Event**: Leads Frodo to Shelob's lair
- **Justification**: Gollum personality wins, plans to take Ring from corpse

### 7 Key Scenes

**Scene 1: Capture (Emyn Muil, Chapter 3)**
- Sam catches Gollum trying to steal Ring while Frodo sleeps
- **Choice**: Kill / Bind with rope / Show mercy
- **Best**: Show mercy → Sméagol emerges, swears oath on "Precious"

**Scene 2: Dead Marshes (Chapter 4)**
- Gollum guides through marshes, warns of corpse-lights
- "Don't follow the lights! Nasty lights! They leads to death..."
- Frodo nearly drowns, Gollum saves him (trust +15 if thanked)

**Scene 3: Black Gate (Morannon, Chapter 5)**
- Gollum reveals secret path (Cirith Ungol)
- **Choice**: Trust Gollum's path OR try Black Gate (suicide)
- "Master mustn't go there! Too many soldiers! Sméagol knows better way..."

**Scene 4: Forbidden Pool (Henneth Annûn, Chapter 6)**
- Gollum fishes in forbidden pool, Faramir's men want to kill him
- **Choice**: Warn Gollum (trust +20) OR let him be captured (trust -30)
- **Canonical**: Frodo warns him, but Gollum feels betrayed anyway (trust -10)

**Scene 5: Stairs of Cirith Ungol (Chapter 7)**
- Gollum debates internally whether to betray Frodo
- **Internal monologue**: "Master is nice to us... But the Precious! We wants it! No! Leave master alone!"
- **Turning Point**:
  - High trust: Sméagol almost wins, touching moment
  - Low trust: Gollum wins, leads to Shelob
  - Canonical: Sam wakes up, ruins the moment, Gollum turns to betrayal

**Scene 6: Shelob's Lair (Chapter 7)**
- Gollum abandons Frodo to Shelob
- "She will deal with them... then we takes it! The Precious will be ours!"
- **Outcome**: Frodo paralyzed, Sam fights Shelob

**Scene 7: Mount Doom (Sammath Naur, Chapter 9)**
- Final confrontation - Gollum attacks Frodo for Ring
- **Canonical**: Bites off Frodo's finger with Ring, falls into lava dancing with joy
- **Alternate Endings**:
  - Redemption route: Sméagol helps Frodo throw Ring in
  - Corruption route: Frodo claims Ring, Gollum attacks, both fall (player dies)

### Combat Stats
- **HP**: 120
- **Damage**: 30
- **Abilities**:
  - **Throttle**: Grapple attack, 40 damage + stun 1 turn (leaps onto victim's back)
  - **Sneak Attack**: 60 damage from stealth
  - **Cave Adaptation**: Perfect vision in darkness, +50% stealth underground
- **Weakness**: Sunlight (blinded), loud noises (frightened)

### Tragic Element
Once a hobbit like Frodo, corrupted by the Ring. A mirror of what Frodo could become. Redemption is barely possible, but the path exists for those who show perfect kindness.

---

## 🎒 Expanded Equipment

### Hobbit Gear
- **Hobbit Traveling Cloak**: +10% stealth in forests
- **Walking Stick**: 8 damage, +5 stamina regen when traveling
- **Elven Rope (Lothlórien)**: Never breaks, 50ft, can climb any surface
- **Pipe-weed Pouch**: Smoking restores +10 morale, -5 stress
  - Brands: Longbottom Leaf, Old Toby, Southern Star
- **Second Breakfast Rations**: Restore 20 HP, +morale (bacon, eggs, sausages, mushrooms)

### Ranger Gear
- **Ranger Cloak (weathered)**: 15 defense, +20% stealth, +cold resistance
- **Athelas (Kingsfoil)**: Cure poison/disease, +50 HP (in Aragorn's hands only)
- **Ranger's Longbow**: 40 damage, long range, +accuracy in dim light
- **Travel Bread (cram)**: Restore 30 HP, lasts forever

### Elven Artifacts
- **Hithlain (Elven Rope)**: Weightless, unbreakable, glows in dark
- **Miruvor (Cordial of Imladris)**: Full HP/Stamina restore, +fire resistance 1 hour
- **Elven Waybread (Lembas)**: One bite = full day's sustenance, -5 corruption (12 cakes)
- **Elven Brooch (Lothlórien leaf)**: +Hope, identifies wearer as friend of elves

### Dwarven Crafts
- **Dwarven Ale**: +20 HP, +Strength 10 min, -Agility 10 min
- **Mithril Chain Shirt**: 90 defense, light as feather, blocks one lethal hit per day
- **Dwarven Mining Pick**: 25 damage, can mine mithril, break stone doors

### Gondorian Equipment
- **White Tree Livery**: 35 defense, +Authority in Gondor (black surcoat with white tree)
- **Horn of Gondor**: Call for help, +Courage to nearby friends (Boromir's, cloven at Amon Hen)
- **Elendilmir (Star of Elendil)**: Crown, mark of true King, +Authority 50% (Aragorn's)

### Enemy Loot
- **Orc Draught**: +30 Stamina, +10 Strength, -10 HP (poisonous)
- **Black Arrow**: 60 damage, +50% vs dragons (heirloom of Dale, slew Smaug)
- **Morgul Blade (shard)**: 70 damage, cursed wound (victim becomes wraith) ⚠️ DO NOT USE

---

## 👥 Additional NPCs

### Bilbo Baggins
- **Title**: The Ring-finder
- **Age**: 131 years old
- **Role**: Mentor, lore-keeper
- **Location**: Rivendell (retired)
- **Gifts to Frodo**: Sting, Mithril vest, One Ring (unknowingly), Elvish lore
- **Quest**: Help Bilbo finish "There and Back Again"
- **Dialogue**: "It's mine! My own! My... precious... *catches himself* No, no... you must take it, Frodo."

### Tom Bombadil
- **Title**: Master of wood, water and hill
- **Race**: Unknown (Maia? Nature spirit?)
- **Age**: Older than the world
- **Level**: 99
- **Location**: Old Forest (near Shire)
- **Unique Trait**: ONLY being immune to One Ring - can wear it without turning invisible
- **Abilities**: Command over nature, drives away Barrow-wights with song
- **Dialogue Style**: Rhyming verse - "Hey dol! merry dol! ring a dong dillo!"
- **Wife**: Goldberry (River-daughter)

### Other Notable NPCs

**Hobbits**:
- **Farmer Maggot**: Gruff but kind farmer, provides mushrooms, warns of Black Riders
- **Fredegar "Fatty" Bolger**: Cowardly but loyal, stays behind as decoy
- **Lotho Sackville-Baggins**: Villain, industrializes Shire under Sharkey

**Elves**:
- **Glorfindel**: Elf-lord, killed Balrog in First Age, rescues Frodo from Nazgûl
- **Haldir**: Marchwarden of Lothlórien, guards border
- **Celeborn**: Galadriel's husband, gives boats to Fellowship

**Men**:
- **Éomer**: Third Marshal of Rohan, later King, leads Rohirrim
- **Denethor II**: Steward of Gondor, prideful, despairing, suicide by fire
- **Barliman Butterbur**: Innkeeper of Prancing Pony, forgets Gandalf's letter

**Nazgûl**:
- **Witch-king of Angmar**: Lord of Nazgûl, "No man can kill me" (killed by Éowyn + Merry)
- **Khamûl**: Second Chief, best tracker, leads hunt in Shire

**Ents**:
- **Treebeard (Fangorn)**: Eldest Ent, ~17,000 years old, "Don't be hasty!"
- **Quickbeam**: Hasty Ent (rowan tree), befriends Merry and Pippin

**Sauron's Servants**:
- **Mouth of Sauron**: Lieutenant of Barad-dûr, diplomat at Black Gate
- **Gothmog**: Lieutenant of Morgul, leads siege of Minas Tirith

---

**Usage in Game**:
- Reference this file when playing LOTR world
- Gollum's trust meter is critical for alternate endings
- All equipment stats are balanced for mid-fantasy power level
- NPCs provide quests, lore, and combat support

**Implementation Status**: 
- ✅ Gollum's 7 key scenes mapped to chapters
- ✅ Trust/Redemption mechanics designed
- ✅ Equipment categorized by race/faction
- ✅ 25+ NPCs with roles and dialogue
- 🚧 Ready for SKILL.md integration

files.worlds/f15-down/ART_STYLE_GUIDE.md:
# Shadow War - Art Style Guide

## 🎨 Visual Style: Command & Conquer RTS Aesthetic

**Reference**: Command & Conquer Generals, Red Alert series, World in Conflict

---

## 🖼️ Character Portraits

### Style Requirements
- **NOT photorealistic** - stylized 3D renders
- Command & Conquer Generals commander portrait style
- Dramatic, heroic poses
- Cinematic lighting with faction color accents
- Age 35-50, battle-hardened but not gritty/realistic

### Prompt Template
```
Portrait of {name}, a {role} from {faction}.
Command & Conquer Generals style military commander portrait.
3D render, stylized but detailed.
Wearing tactical uniform with rank insignia and {faction_color} accents.
Command center background with holographic tactical displays.
Heroic determined pose, looking at camera.
Cinematic dramatic lighting with red/blue accent lights.
RTS game character portrait aesthetic - similar to C&C Generals faction leaders.
{personality_trait}
NOT photorealistic, NOT documentary style.
```

### Faction Color Coding
- **Phoenix State**: Blue/white accents
- **Mountain Republic**: Red/black accents
- **Western Alliance**: Navy blue/gold accents
- **Gulf Emirates**: Teal/white accents
- **Eastern Coalition**: Red/yellow accents
- **Desert Kingdom**: Green/gold accents

### Personality Visual Traits
- **Aggressive**: Fierce expression, forward-leaning pose, clenched jaw
- **Diplomatic**: Calm demeanor, hand gestures, thoughtful gaze
- **Pragmatic**: Sharp calculating eyes, arms crossed, confident stance
- **Moral**: Compassionate but firm, open posture, steady gaze

---

## 🗺️ Tactical Maps

### Style Requirements
- Isometric or top-down battlefield view
- C&C minimap aesthetic with unit icons
- Territory markers and control zones
- HUD overlays with threat indicators
- Red/blue faction color coding
- NOT satellite imagery, NOT photorealistic

### Prompt Template
```
Command & Conquer style tactical battlefield map.
Isometric view of {location}.
Military RTS game minimap aesthetic.
Red enemy positions (Mountain Republic) vs Blue friendly (Phoenix State).
Unit icons: tanks, aircraft, missile sites, buildings.
Territory control zones highlighted.
HUD overlays with threat indicators and movement vectors.
Dark blue background with grid lines.
Glowing tactical markers and waypoints.
C&C Generals war room holographic display style.
NOT satellite photo, NOT realistic.
```

---

## 💥 Combat Scenes

### Style Requirements
- Dynamic action like C&C cutscenes
- Stylized explosions and effects
- Dramatic camera angles
- RTS game cinematic quality
- NOT gritty/realistic war photography

### Prompt Template
```
Command & Conquer style {combat_scene}.
RTS game cinematic cutscene aesthetic.
Dramatic action shot: {description}.
Stylized explosions with bloom effects.
Military units in dynamic poses.
Cinematic camera angle from low/side.
Faction colors: {faction_colors}.
Sunset/dramatic sky background.
Similar to C&C Generals mission briefing cinematics.
NOT realistic war photography, NOT documentary style.
```

### Example Scenes
- **Airstrike**: F-35s dropping bombs on facility, stylized explosions
- **Missile Launch**: Ballistic missiles launching from underground silos, dramatic sky
- **Drone Swarm**: 50 drones flying in formation, red targeting lasers
- **Naval Battle**: Destroyer firing missiles at coastline, ocean spray
- **Special Forces Raid**: Commandos breaching door with flashbangs, tactical lights

---

## 🏙️ Location Backgrounds

### Style Requirements
- Stylized military base/city renders
- RTS game environment quality
- Cinematic lighting and atmosphere
- Clear silhouettes, not too detailed
- Faction-appropriate architecture

### Prompt Template
```
{location_name} in Command & Conquer game style.
RTS game environment render.
{location_type} with {architectural_style}.
Faction colors and flags: {faction}.
Cinematic atmosphere: {time_of_day}.
Military structures: hangars, radar towers, defensive walls.
Clear readable silhouettes.
Similar to C&C Generals base construction view.
NOT photorealistic, NOT generic stock photos.
```

---

## 🎭 UI Elements

### HUD Overlays
- Tactical minimap (top-right corner)
- Resource counters (top-left)
- Threat indicators (red/yellow/green)
- Unit health bars
- Faction emblems
- Day/time counter
- Mission objectives panel

### Color Scheme
- **Background**: Dark blue-gray (#1a2332)
- **Friendly**: Blue (#4a9eff)
- **Enemy**: Red (#ff4a4a)
- **Neutral**: Yellow (#ffd54a)
- **UI Accents**: Teal (#00ffcc)

---

## ❌ What to Avoid

### DO NOT Use:
- ❌ Photorealistic military stock photos
- ❌ Gritty war documentary style
- ❌ Real news footage aesthetic
- ❌ Overly detailed realistic gore
- ❌ Generic modern military shooter look
- ❌ Desaturated color palette

### Instead Use:
- ✅ Stylized 3D renders
- ✅ Saturated faction colors
- ✅ Heroic/cinematic framing
- ✅ RTS game aesthetic
- ✅ Clean readable visuals
- ✅ Dramatic lighting

---

## 🎮 Reference Material

### Primary References
1. **Command & Conquer: Generals** (2003)
   - Faction commanders portraits
   - Mission briefing screens
   - Tactical map UI

2. **Command & Conquer: Red Alert 3** (2008)
   - Live-action cutscene aesthetics translated to 3D
   - Faction color coding
   - Over-the-top military drama

3. **World in Conflict** (2007)
   - Cinematic tactical view
   - RTS camera angles
   - Military unit portrayal

### Secondary References
- **DEFCON**: Minimalist tactical map aesthetic
- **Act of War**: Modern warfare RTS style
- **EndWar**: Voice command era military RTS

---

## 📝 Quick Checklist

Before generating any Shadow War image, verify:

- [ ] Prompt includes "Command & Conquer style"
- [ ] Prompt explicitly says "NOT photorealistic"
- [ ] Faction colors are specified
- [ ] Visual style is "RTS game" not "realistic photography"
- [ ] Lighting is "cinematic/dramatic" not "natural"
- [ ] Reference to C&C Generals is included

---

**Last Updated**: 2026-04-05
**Applies To**: Shadow War world only (other YumFu worlds use their own styles)

# Content Policy for F15 Down

## ⚠️ Sensitivity Guidelines

**F15 Down** is a fictional military strategy game inspired by real-world conflicts but **fully fictionalized** to avoid sensitive content.

---

## ✅ What We DO

### Fictionalization Rules

1. **Faction Names**: All made-up codenames
   - ❌ NOT: "Israel", "Iran", "USA"
   - ✅ YES: "Phoenix State", "Mountain Republic", "Western Alliance"

2. **Character Names**: All fictional
   - ❌ NOT: Real historical figures, politicians, military leaders
   - ✅ YES: "Rashid al-Zahir", "Damarkil", "Commander Arash"

3. **Location Names**: Fictional geography
   - ❌ NOT: "Tel Aviv", "Tehran", "Hormuz Strait"
   - ✅ YES: "Port Azure", "Mountain City", "Azure Strait"

4. **Organization Names**: Fictional groups
   - ❌ NOT: Real intelligence agencies, terror groups
   - ✅ YES: "Shadow Eye", "Highland Corps", "Falcon Unit"

5. **Equipment Names**: Generic or renamed
   - ❌ AVOID: Specific Israeli/Iranian weapon systems with political baggage
   - ✅ YES: "Steel Shield" (not Iron Dome), "Shahed drones" (common knowledge)

---

## ❌ What We AVOID

### Red Lines

1. **No Real Names**
   - No real politicians (Netanyahu, Khamenei, etc.)
   - No real military leaders
   - No real terror group leaders

2. **No Real Recent Events**
   - No Oct 7 references
   - No specific real assassinations
   - No real drone attacks with dates/casualties

3. **No Hate Speech**
   - No ethnic stereotypes
   - No religious hatred
   - No dehumanization

4. **No Glorification**
   - No celebrating civilian casualties
   - No promoting war crimes
   - No extremist propaganda

5. **No Political Advocacy**
   - Not pro-Israel or pro-Iran propaganda
   - Not taking sides in real conflicts
   - Focus on moral dilemmas, not politics

---

## 🎮 Gameplay Approach

### Moral Complexity

The game presents **moral dilemmas** without easy answers:

- Civilian casualties vs. military necessity
- Retaliation vs. escalation
- Justice vs. peace
- National security vs. international law

**Goal**: Make players think, not promote any ideology.

---

## 📝 Character Naming Guidelines

### Safe Fictional Names

**Phoenix State** (inspired by Israel):
- First names: David, Sarah, Yosef, Rivka, Avi, Tamar
- Last names: Cohen, Levi, Mizrahi, Avraham (common, not specific to real figures)
- Made-up names: Damarkil, Zorah, Elyon

**Mountain Republic** (inspired by Iran):
- First names: Rashid, Arash, Parisa, Leyla, Kaveh
- Last names: al-Zahir, Rahmani, Tavakoli, Hosseini (common Persian names)
- Avoid: Real IRGC commanders, Quds Force leaders

**Western Alliance**:
- Generic Western names: James, Michael, Sarah, Emily
- Last names: Smith, Johnson, Williams

**Desert Kingdom**:
- First names: Khalid, Fahad, Noura, Amina
- Last names: al-Rashid, al-Mansour

---

## 🗺️ Geography Rules

### Fictional Locations

All locations are **made-up** or **genericized**:

- "Port Azure" (not Tel Aviv/Haifa)
- "Mountain City" (not Tehran)
- "Azure Peninsula" (not specific to any real region)
- "Highland Fortress" (not real Iranian sites)
- "Damascus District" (generic, not real Damascus)

**Why**: Avoid mapping real attacks to real places.

---

## 🎖️ Military Units

### Equipment Naming

**Safe to mention**:
- F-15, F-35, A-10 (widely known US aircraft)
- B-2, B-21 (US strategic bombers)
- Patriot missiles (common knowledge)
- Shahed drones (public knowledge from Ukraine conflict)

**Avoid or rename**:
- Iron Dome → **Steel Shield**
- Quds Force → **Highland Corps**
- Mossad → **Shadow Eye**
- Hezbollah/Hamas → Generic "proxy militias"

---

## 💬 Dialogue & Narrative

### Tone Guidelines

1. **Respectful**:
   - Treat all sides as humans with motivations
   - No cartoonish villains
   - Show internal debates in each faction

2. **Realistic**:
   - War has costs on all sides
   - No easy wins
   - Moral ambiguity

3. **Educational** (without preaching):
   - Show how modern conflicts work
   - Asymmetric warfare concepts
   - Diplomatic complexity

4. **Empathetic**:
   - Soldiers on all sides have families
   - Civilians suffer regardless of side
   - Leaders face impossible choices

---

## 🛡️ Content Warning

**Display at game start**:

> ⚠️ **Content Warning**
> 
> This game contains:
> - Fictional war scenarios inspired by real conflicts
> - Moral dilemmas involving civilian casualties
> - Strategic violence in a military context
> 
> All factions, characters, and events are fictional.
> This is not a political statement about any real conflict.

---

## 📊 Review Checklist

Before publishing any F15 Down content, verify:

- [ ] All character names are fictional
- [ ] No real politicians or military leaders mentioned
- [ ] All faction names are codenames
- [ ] All locations are fictional or genericized
- [ ] No hate speech or dehumanization
- [ ] No glorification of war crimes
- [ ] Moral complexity is preserved
- [ ] Content warning is displayed
- [ ] Tone is respectful to all sides

---

## 🔄 Updates

If a name/place is flagged as too sensitive:
1. Replace with fictional alternative
2. Update all references
3. Document change in this file

**Last reviewed**: 2026-04-05

---

**Goal**: Create an engaging, thought-provoking strategy game that respects the real human cost of conflict while remaining fiction.
files.worlds/f15-down/DESIGN.md:
# 🌍 New YumFu World: F15 Down (F15坠落)

## World Concept

**Genre**: Modern military strategy RPG with geopolitical choices
**Setting**: Fictional Middle East region "Azure Peninsula" (蔚蓝半岛)
**Time Period**: Alternative 2026
**Style**: Realistic military tactics + diplomatic choices + moral dilemmas

**⚠️ Content Policy**:
- ALL factions are fictional with made-up names
- ALL characters have fictional names (no real historical figures)
- Inspired by real conflicts but fully fictionalized
- No real country names, only faction codenames
- No real terrorist organizations, only fictional groups

---

## Factions (All Renamed)

### Major Powers

1. **United States** → **Western Alliance (WA / 西盟)**
   - Military superpower
   - Advanced tech: drones, stealth aircraft
   - Strong navy presence
   - Attributes: Technology 95, Diplomacy 70, Resources 85

2. **Israel** → **Phoenix State (PS / 凤凰国)**
   - Elite special forces (Falcon Unit - 猎鹰特遣队)
   - Advanced missile defense (Iron Dome → Steel Shield 钢盾)
   - Intelligence agency (Mossad → Shadow Eye 影眼)
   - Attributes: Elite Forces 98, Intelligence 95, Tech 90

3. **Iran** → **Mountain Republic (MR / 山岳共和国)**
   - Revolutionary Guards → Highland Corps (高地军团)
   - Proxy forces across region
   - Missile/drone capabilities
   - Attributes: Asymmetric War 90, Resources 70, Influence 75

### Regional Players

4. **UAE** → **Gulf Emirates (GE / 海湾联盟)**
   - Economic powerhouse
   - Modern air force
   - Diplomatic bridge-builder
   - Attributes: Wealth 95, Diplomacy 85, Tech 75

5. **China** → **Eastern Coalition (EC / 东方联盟)**
   - Economic ties, infrastructure deals
   - Naval presence
   - Diplomatic mediator
   - Attributes: Economy 98, Diplomacy 80, Naval 70

6. **Saudi Arabia** → **Desert Kingdom (DK / 沙漠王国)**
   - Oil wealth, modern weapons
   - Regional influence
   - Sunni leadership
   - Attributes: Wealth 90, Military 75, Influence 80

---

## Recent Events (Fictionalized)

### Major Incidents Timeline

**Day 1 - "Viper Strike"**
- Phoenix State special forces eliminate MR general "Hassan al-Qamar" (虚构)
- Location: Neutral zone safehouse
- Reaction: MR vows retaliation

**Day 7 - "Sky Fall"**
- MR launches drone swarm attack
- Targets: PS power grid, oil refinery in Port Azure
- 3 stealth drones shot down, 12 hit targets
- Civilian infrastructure damaged

**Day 14 - "Thunder Response"**
- WA-PS joint strike on MR weapon facilities
- 50+ targets: missile factories, drone bases, command centers
- Collateral damage: school in Damascus District (虚构), hospital wing

**Day 21 - "Shadow Raid"**
- MR-backed militia kidnaps WA contractors in Border City
- PS Falcon Unit launches rescue operation
- 2 hostages saved, 1 killed in crossfire

**Day 28 - "Black Friday"**
- MR shoots down WA surveillance drone over Azure Strait
- International waters dispute
- EC calls for ceasefire, DK stays neutral

**Day 35 - "Fallen Eagle" (CSAR)**
- MR SA-400 shoots down WA F-15E near Highland Fortress
- Pilot "Vega" ejects 85km behind enemy lines
- Full Combat Search and Rescue operation launched
- Assets: A-10 Warthogs, HH-60W Jolly Green, AH-64 Apache, CV-22 Osprey, C-130J, MQ-9 Reaper
- Complications: active SAM, sandstorm, MR search parties, damaged aircraft
- Key dilemma: if aircraft can't return — switch to smaller planes, emergency highway landings, or abandon and walk to border

---

## Gameplay Mechanics

### Player Choices

**Choose Your Faction**: Each has unique strengths/weaknesses
- **WA**: Air superiority, tech advantage, international support
- **PS**: Elite special ops, intelligence network, defensive tech
- **MR**: Asymmetric warfare, proxy forces, missile arsenal
- **GE**: Diplomacy, economic leverage, modern air force
- **EC**: Economic sanctions, UN influence, naval blockade

### Decision Tree Examples

**Scenario 1: Hostage Crisis**
```
MR militia captures 5 WA engineers in border town
→ [PS Falcon Unit] Immediate rescue raid (high risk, diplomatic fallout)
→ [Negotiate] Trade prisoner exchange (slow, unpopular at home)
→ [Economic Pressure] Freeze MR assets, wait (civilian risk)
```

**Scenario 2: Civilian Casualty**
```
Your airstrike hits school (intel failure)
→ [Admit] Apologize, compensate families (domestic backlash)
→ [Deny] Claim MR propaganda (international criticism)
→ [Blame MR] Say they used human shields (evidence needed)
```

**Scenario 3: Oil Refinery Attack**
```
MR drones target your oil facility
→ [Retaliate] Strike MR energy infrastructure
→ [Defend] Invest in air defense, absorb loss
→ [Escalate] Target MR leadership (risk of wider war)
```

---

## Game Features

### 1. **Strategic Map**
- Azure Peninsula terrain
- Key cities: Port Azure, Mountain City, Desert Gate, Border Town
- Infrastructure: oil fields, power plants, ports, airbases
- Real-time threat tracker (missile launches, drone swarms)

### 2. **Unit Types**
- **Special Forces**: Stealth raids, hostage rescue
- **Air Force**: Stealth bombers, fighter jets, drones
- **Navy**: Carriers, destroyers, submarines
- **Missiles**: Precision strikes, infrastructure damage
- **Cyber**: Hack enemy comms, disable defense systems
- **Proxies**: Militia groups, deniable ops

### 3. **Resources**
- **Budget**: Funding for operations
- **International Support**: UN votes, sanctions
- **Intelligence**: Intel on enemy positions
- **Public Opinion**: Domestic/global approval
- **Energy**: Oil/gas control affects economy

### 4. **Consequences**
- Civilian casualties → international outcry
- Failed ops → domestic backlash
- Escalation → neighboring countries join
- Economic damage → budget constraints
- War crimes → UN sanctions

---

## Story Arcs

### Arc 1: Viper's Nest (Day 1-30)
Assassination of MR general triggers spiral of retaliation

### Arc 2: Shadow Lines (Day 31-60)
Proxy war intensifies, hostage crises, border skirmishes

### Arc 3: Storm Horizon (Day 61-90)
Risk of full-scale war, diplomatic endgame or total conflict

---

## Special Operations (Playable Missions)

1. **"Falcon Dawn"** - Rescue hostages from Border City
2. **"Steel Rain"** - Defend against MR missile barrage
3. **"Silent Hunter"** - Submarine infiltration to plant surveillance
4. **"Fire and Shadow"** - Night raid on MR weapons cache
5. **"Last Light"** - Evacuate civilians before airstrike
6. **"Fallen Eagle"** - CSAR: Full air armada rescues downed F-15 pilot deep behind enemy lines

---

## Moral Dilemmas

**The Trolley Problem Scenarios**:
- Strike weapons depot in residential area? (10 civilians vs 100 future deaths)
- Torture captured enemy for intel on imminent attack?
- Use economic sanctions knowing they harm civilians?
- Arm questionable rebel groups to weaken enemy?

---

## Technical Implementation

### File Structure
```
~/clawd/skills/yumfu/worlds/
  shadow-war/
    world.json          # World metadata
    factions.json       # 6 major factions
    events.json         # 50+ scripted events
    locations.json      # Map data
    units.json          # Military units
    decisions.json      # Choice trees
    consequences.json   # Outcome matrices
```

### Art Style
- Satellite imagery aesthetic for map
- Military-grade HUD
- News report style event narration
- Intel briefing documents
- Propaganda posters for each faction

---

## Sample Opening

```
📰 BREAKING NEWS - Azure Peninsula Crisis

Day 1, 0600 Hours
Port Azure Times

MOUNTAIN REPUBLIC GENERAL ASSASSINATED

Hassan al-Qamar, commander of MR Highland Corps, 
eliminated in precision strike on neutral zone safehouse.

Phoenix State claims responsibility. 
Western Alliance confirms intelligence support.
Mountain Republic vows "thunder and fire" retaliation.

Your role: [Choose Faction]
- Western Alliance: Maintain regional stability
- Phoenix State: Ensure national security
- Mountain Republic: Defend sovereignty
- Gulf Emirates: Protect economic interests
- Eastern Coalition: Mediate and gain influence
- Desert Kingdom: Navigate sectarian tensions

The world is watching. What will you do?
```

---

## Next Steps

1. Create world.json with faction balance
2. Write 50+ event scenarios
3. Build decision tree system
4. Design consequence matrices
5. Generate first round of AI art (military HUD, maps)
6. Test gameplay locally
7. Balance difficulty/realism

---

**Themes**: 
- No clear "good guys" - all factions have valid and flawed motives
- Fog of war - incomplete intel leads to tragic mistakes
- Blowback - today's ally is tomorrow's enemy
- Civilian cost - every military choice has human consequences
- Diplomacy vs Force - when to negotiate, when to strike

**Goal**: Make players think hard about real-world geopolitical complexity
files.worlds/f15-down/alibaba_storyline.md:
# Alibaba 剧情线 - 完整设计

## 游戏哲学

**不是选A/B就完事** - 每个决定只是打开下一扇门。
**选B（拒绝刺杀）** 不是结束，而是开启另一段旅程。
**目标**: 30-50个有意义的决策点，横跨30天游戏时间。

---

## 📖 三大主线弧

### Arc 1: 生存 (Day 5-10)
战争结束，但Alibaba的处境危险
- 凤凰国特工在追杀抵抗成员
- 组织已瓦解，战友各奔东西
- 需要决定：逃跑/藏匿/继续战斗

### Arc 2: 身份 (Day 10-20)  
Alibaba面对内心挣扎
- 是继续当战士，还是回归平民？
- 认识新的人（记者/难民/敌方士兵）
- 了解战争的另一面（凤凰国平民视角）

### Arc 3: 选择 (Day 20-30)
命运的最终抉择
- 多种结局，没有绝对的对错
- 每个选择都有代价

---

## 🗺️ 详细剧情节点 (30+个)

### === Arc 1: 生存 ===

**Day 5 - 节点1: 第一个早晨**
(见主游戏开场 A/B/C)

**Day 5 - 节点2: Yusuf的真相**
无论你选什么，Yusuf会再次联系你。
他不只是战友，他是情报网络的一个节点。
他背后有人。

**Day 5 - 节点3: 凤凰国特工**
你发现有人在跟踪你。
- 抖掉跟踪？换装逃跑？
- 还是设陷阱反跟踪？

**Day 6 - 节点4: 父亲的废墟**
你回到父亲修车铺的废墟。
发现父亲还活着，躲在邻居家。
父亲说："儿子，够了，我们走吧。"
- 陪父亲离开城市？
- 留下来继续？

**Day 6 - 节点5: 老战友Omar**
Omar找到你，带来消息：组织还有一个秘密仓库，
里面有武器、钱、假证件。
但地点只有他知道。
Omar的眼神有点奇怪...

**Day 7 - 节点6: 仓库里的秘密**
仓库里除了武器，还有一份文件：
组织一直在接受外国资金（来自沙漠王国？东方联盟？）
你的"抵抗运动"背后有人在操控。
- 愤怒？继续用这些资源？
- 还是彻底脱离组织？

...以此类推30+个节点

---

## 🎭 多重结局 (8种)

1. **流亡者** - 逃离蔚蓝半岛，在国外重新开始
2. **战地记者** - 用无人机和镜头记录真相
3. **地下领袖** - 成为新一代抵抗力量的核心
4. **双面间谍** - 被凤凰国情报机构招募
5. **和平大使** - 参与战后重建，帮助双方对话
6. **殉道者** - 为信念牺牲（悲剧结局）
7. **普通人** - 放下一切，和父亲过平凡生活
8. **复仇者** - 成功刺杀目标，但引发更大战争

---

## 💡 设计原则

1. **没有选项是死路** - 每个选择都打开新的可能性
2. **NPC有记忆** - 你之前的选择影响他们的态度
3. **信息不完整** - 你永远不知道全部真相
4. **道德灰色** - 没有绝对的好人坏人
5. **时间压力** - 有些事情不行动就会错过
6. **意外事件** - 随机事件打乱计划

---

## 📊 隐藏追踪指标

- **愤怒值** (0-100): 影响极端选项的可用性
- **信任值** (各NPC独立): 影响信息获取
- **暴露度** (0-100): 越高越危险
- **父亲关系** (0-100): 影响家庭线剧情
- **国际关注度** (0-100): 影响媒体/外交线

      "category": "special_forces",
      "description": "Combat Search and Rescue specialist. Jump into hostile territory to recover downed pilots. Every second counts.",
      "description_zh": "战斗搜救专家，深入敌境营救坠机飞行员。每一秒都是生死之差。",
      "faction": "western_alliance",
      "background": "You are part of the 563rd Rescue Group, Western Alliance Air Force. Your motto: 'That Others May Live.' When an F-15 goes down over Mountain Republic territory, you are the last hope.",
      "background_zh": "你属于西盟空军第563救援大队。座右铭：'为他人而生'。当一架F-15坠落在山岳共和国领土上，你是飞行员最后的希望。",
      "starting_equipment": [
        "HH-60G Pave Hawk rescue helicopter (primary insert)",
        "MC-130J Commando II tanker/transport (standby)",
        "A-10 Warthog escort flight x2 (suppression)",
        "Personal: M4 rifle + medical kit + parachute",
        "SERE kit (Survival, Evasion, Resistance, Escape)",

        "NVGs + infrared strobe"
      ],
      "special_abilities": [
        "HAHO/HALO parachute insertion into denied areas",
        "Combat trauma medicine (keep pilot alive under fire)",
        "Call in A-10 / AC-130 fire support",
        "Request MC-130J airdrop if helicopter is denied",
        "Switch to small civilian aircraft if military assets compromised",
        "Abandon aircraft and evade on foot if necessary"
      ],
      "missions": [
        "Locate downed F-15 pilot via emergency beacon",
        "Neutralize or evade enemy search teams",
        "Stabilize and extract wounded pilot",
        "Coordinate multi-asset rescue package",
        "Survive if primary extraction fails"
      ],
      "rescue_package_options": {
        "primary": {
          "asset": "HH-60G Pave Hawk x2",
          "escort": "A-10 Warthog x2",
          "condition": "Low enemy air defense — standard CSAR",
          "risk": "medium"
        },
        "elevated_threat": {
          "asset": "HH-60G + MC-130J Combat Talon",
          "escort": "F-15 SEAD flight + A-10 x2",
          "condition": "Medium SAM threat — suppress and extract",
          "risk": "high"
        },
        "denied_airspace": {
          "asset": "MC-130J low-level airdrop",
          "escort": "B-2 SEAD strike first",
          "condition": "Heavy SAM/AAA — no helicopter survivable",
          "risk": "very_high",
          "note": "PJ parachutes in from MC-130. Helicopter cannot enter."
        },
        "extreme_fallback": {
          "asset": "Civilian Cessna or light prop plane (unmarked)",
          "escort": "None — stealth approach only",
          "condition": "All military assets compromised or shot down",
          "risk": "extreme",
          "note": "Abandon uniform. Fly low under radar in civilian aircraft. If intercepted, abandon plane and evade on foot."
        },
        "abort": {
          "condition": "Pilot captured or KIA confirmed / rescue package fully destroyed",
          "outcome": "Mission abort. Pilot becomes POW storyline."
        }
      },
      "scenario": {
        "trigger": "fallen_eagle_event (Day 35) - F-15E shot down by SA-400 Stone Shield",
        "pilot_status_options": [
          "Alive, evading — beacon active",
          "Alive, injured — needs immediate medevac",
          "Alive, captured — POW scenario",
          "KIA — body recovery mission"
        ],
        "enemy_response": [
          "Mountain Republic scrambles search teams within 15 min",
          "SAM batteries activated",
          "Proxy militia on motorcycles sweeping the area",
          "Possible hostage broadcast within 2 hours"
        ],
        "time_pressure": "Golden hour: 60 minutes before pilot is found or dies from injuries",
        "note": "See events.json:fallen_eagle for full story context"
      },
      "moral_dilemmas": [
        "A-10 must strafe militia trucks — civilian workers may be nearby",
        "Helicopter is hit and going down — do you abort or press in?",
        "Pilot is alive but enemy closing fast — leave now with partial injuries or wait for full stabilization?",
        "Civilian aircraft option means flying unarmed into hostile territory — one burst from a gunboat ends everything",
        "Pilot says abandon him — POW protocol vs your oath to bring everyone home"
      ],
      "risk_level": "extreme",
      "prestige": 97,
      "nickname": "That Others May Live",
      "moral_weight": "You will risk five lives to save one. That is not a question. That is the job.",
      "linked_event": "fallen_eagle",
      "pilot_to_rescue": {
        "callsign": "Vega",
        "name_zh": "伊莲娜·托雷斯上尉",
        "location": "highland_wastes",
        "distance_behind_lines": "85km"
      }
    },
    {
      "id": "csar_hh60_pilot",

      "name_zh": "HH-60G铺路鹰救援直升机飞行员",
      "category": "air_force",
      "description": "Rescue helicopter pilot flying into hostile fire to recover downed aircrew. If the zone is too hot, find another way in.",
      "description_zh": "驾驶救援直升机冲入敌火，营救坠机机组。如果区域太热，就换条路。",

          "warm": "Nap-of-earth approach, A-10 suppression, quick extract.",
          "hot": "MC-130 airdrop PJ first. Orbit outside SAM ring. Enter only after SEAD.",
          "denied": "Cannot enter. Switch to civilian aircraft option or abort."

      "linked_event": "fallen_eagle",

{
  "world_id": "f15-down",
  "name": "F15 Down: Azure Peninsula War",
  "name_zh": "F15坠落：蔚蓝半岛战争",
  "genre": "modern_military_strategy",
  "setting": "alternative_2026_middle_east",
  "theme": "geopolitical_conflict",
  
  "description": "A realistic modern military strategy game set in a fictionalized Middle East. Choose your faction and navigate the complex web of alliances, proxy wars, and moral dilemmas in a region on the brink of total war.",
  
  "description_zh": "设定在虚构中东的现代军事策略游戏。选择你的阵营，在这个濒临全面战争的地区中，应对复杂的联盟关系、代理人战争和道德困境。",
  
  "playable_factions": [
    "western_alliance",
    "phoenix_state",
    "mountain_republic",
    "gulf_emirates",
    "eastern_coalition",
    "desert_kingdom"
  ],
  
  "game_length": "90_days_campaign",
  
  "difficulty": "hard",
  
  "features": [
    "strategic_decision_making",
    "moral_dilemmas",
    "resource_management",
    "special_operations",
    "diplomatic_options",
    "consequences_system",
    "fog_of_war",
    "civilian_casualties"
  ],
  
  "art_style": "command_and_conquer_game_style",
  
  "art_direction": {
    "visual_style": "Command & Conquer RTS game aesthetic",
    "color_palette": "Saturated military colors, red/blue faction coding",
    "ui_style": "Tactical HUD overlays, minimap indicators",
    "character_portraits": "C&C Generals style - dramatic 3D renders with tactical gear",
    "location_maps": "Isometric battlefield view with unit icons and territory markers",
    "combat_scenes": "Dynamic action shots like C&C cutscenes - explosions, vehicles, troops",
    "reference_games": [
      "Command & Conquer: Generals",
      "Command & Conquer: Red Alert",
      "DEFCON",
      "World in Conflict"
    ],
    "avoid": [
      "photorealistic military photography",
      "gritty war documentary style",
      "generic stock military photos"
    ]
  },
  
  "start_date": "Day 1, 0600 Hours",
  
  "initial_event": "viper_strike_assassination",
  
  "win_conditions": [
    "achieve_ceasefire_with_favorable_terms",
    "eliminate_enemy_military_capability",
    "gain_regional_hegemony",
    "broker_lasting_peace_deal"

  "lose_conditions": [
    "faction_collapse",
    "international_isolation",
    "economic_bankruptcy",
    "domestic_coup",
    "total_war_escalation"

    "war_violence",

    "this_war_of_mine",
    "papers_please"
  ],
  
  "created": "2026-04-05",
  "status": "development",
  "local_only": true
}

    "Violence and gore",
    "Political executions",
    "Betrayal and treachery",
    "Character death (permanent)",
    "Morally grey choices"

    "school_year_system": true,
    "total_years": 7,

      "Year 4 (Age 14): Triwizard Tournament, dark mark returns",
      "Year 5 (Age 15): O.W.L.s, DA formation, prophecy",
      "Year 6 (Age 16): N.E.W.T.s prep, horcruxes revealed",
      "Year 7 (Age 17): Final battle, career choice"

      "Must pass year-end exams to advance",
      "House points affect privileges",
      "Friendship levels unlock quests",
      "Spell mastery requires class attendance"
    ],

      "O.W.L.s": "Ordinary Wizarding Levels (Year 5)",
      "N.E.W.T.s": "Nastily Exhausting Wizarding Tests (Year 7)",

      "failure_consequences": "Cannot learn advanced spells in that subject"

files.worlds/journey-to-west/world.json:
{
  "world_id": "journey-to-west",
  "name": "西游记",
  "name_en": "Journey to the West",
  "genre": "mythological_adventure",
  "era": "唐朝 · 贞观年间（约627-649 AD）",
  "default_language": "zh",
  "supported_languages": ["zh", "en"],
  "status": "playable",
  "age_rating": "All Ages (10+)",
  "themes": ["修炼成仙", "正邪之争", "降妖除魔", "权力与信仰", "忠诚与背叛", "自由与约束"],

  "description": "大唐贞观年间，唐太宗派遣高僧唐三藏西天取经。一路上妖魔鬼怪，险阻重重，幸有齐天大圣孙悟空、天蓬元帅猪八戒、卷帘大将沙悟净护法。但这片天地，并不只属于取经队伍——玉皇大帝的天庭、如来佛祖的西天、各路妖王的洞府、女儿国的温柔陷阱……每一方势力都有自己的故事。",

  "factions": [
    {
      "id": "tang_monk_team",
      "name": "取经队伍",
      "name_en": "Pilgrimage Party",
      "leader": "唐三藏（唐僧）",
      "members": ["孙悟空", "猪八戒", "沙悟净", "白龙马"],
      "mission": "西天取经，普度众生",
      "ideology": "佛法无边，慈悲为怀",
      "strength": "孙悟空战力逆天，有观音菩萨庇佑",
      "weakness": "唐僧肉身凡胎，善恶不分，爱听谗言",
      "headquarters": "移动中（大唐→西天108000里）",
      "color": "#F4A460",
      "playable": true
    },
    {
      "id": "heavenly_court",
      "name": "天庭",
      "name_en": "Heavenly Court",
      "leader": "玉皇大帝（玉帝）",
      "key_figures": ["太上老君", "太白金星", "二郎神杨戬", "哪吒三太子", "四大天王", "天兵天将十万"],
      "mission": "维护三界秩序，镇压妖魔",
      "ideology": "等级制度，论资排辈，天命不可违",
      "strength": "十万天兵，法宝无数，诸神护法",
      "weakness": "官僚体制，反应迟缓，斗不过大闹天宫的孙悟空",
      "headquarters": "凌霄宝殿（天宫）",
      "color": "#FFD700",
      "playable": true,
      "note": "玩家可扮演天庭中的小神仙、天将，甚至谋划成为新的掌权者"
    },
    {
      "id": "western_paradise",
      "name": "西天（灵山）",
      "name_en": "Western Paradise",
      "leader": "如来佛祖",
      "key_figures": ["观音菩萨", "文殊菩萨", "普贤菩萨", "地藏菩萨", "十八罗汉", "五百金刚"],
      "mission": "传播佛法，普度众生，布局取经大计",
      "ideology": "因果轮回，慈悲智慧，一切皆在掌控",
      "strength": "法力最高，布局最深，如来一掌镇孙悟空五百年",
      "weakness": "手段迂回，凡事讲因果，不能直接插手",
      "headquarters": "灵鹫山大雷音寺",
      "color": "#E6E6FA",
      "playable": true,
      "note": "玩家可扮演菩萨弟子、罗汉，暗中布局保护取经队伍——或阻止"
    },
    {
      "id": "bull_demon_faction",
      "name": "牛魔王势力",
      "name_en": "Bull Demon King Faction",
      "leader": "牛魔王",
      "key_figures": ["铁扇公主（罗刹女）", "红孩儿", "银角大王", "金角大王（被托塔天王管辖）"],
      "mission": "称霸火焰山周边，对抗天庭与取经队",
      "ideology": "妖王之道，强者为尊",
      "strength": "牛魔王本体战力极强，铁扇公主芭蕉扇无敌，红孩儿三昧真火",
      "weakness": "家庭内部矛盾（牛魔王有外室玉面狐狸），红孩儿被观音收走",
      "headquarters": "火焰山·积雷山摩云洞",
      "color": "#DC143C",
      "playable": true,
      "note": "玩家可扮演牛魔王手下，守护火焰山，对抗孙悟空借芭蕉扇"
    },
    {
      "id": "white_bone_demon",
      "name": "白骨精势力",
      "name_en": "White Bone Demon Faction",
      "leader": "白骨精（白骨夫人）",
      "key_figures": ["蜘蛛精（盘丝洞七位）", "黄袍怪", "蝎子精"],
      "mission": "吃唐僧肉，长生不老",
      "ideology": "弱肉强食，以智取胜",
      "strength": "变化多端，专攻唐僧的软肋（善良）",

  "unique_mechanics": {
    "81_tribulations": {
      "name": "九九八十一难",
      "description": "取经路上必须经历81难，少一难不算功德圆满",
      "player_impact": "某些选择可以避开一难，但如来会补上新的难题"
    },
    "demon_origins": {
      "name": "妖怪来历系统",
      "description": "大多数妖怪都有天庭背景，打败前要查清来历，否则救兵来了也白打",
      "examples": ["金角银角是太上老君的童子", "黄袍怪是天庭奎木狼下凡", "蜘蛛精背后有多目怪"]

    "karmic_balance": {

    "tang_monk_stubbornness": {
      "name": "唐僧执念系统",
      "description": "唐僧越固执，队伍越危险，但也代表佛心越纯",
      "mechanic": "玩家选择（如孙悟空）有时要在服从唐僧和保护他之间选择"
    }
  },

  "endings": [
    {"id": "true_scripture", "name": "取得真经", "desc": "四人成佛成神，功德圆满，九九八十一难全部经历"},
    {"id": "abandoned_pilgrimage", "name": "弃经归隐", "desc": "孙悟空拒绝戴回紧箍咒，与唐僧分道扬镳"},
    {"id": "demon_king", "name": "妖王称霸", "desc": "（妖怪路线）打败取经队，成为一方妖王"},
    {"id": "heavenly_revolution", "name": "天庭变革", "desc": "（天庭路线）改变天庭秩序，成为新的统治者"},
    {"id": "love_story", "name": "女儿国留守", "desc": "唐僧留在女儿国，取经计划失败，但得一段真情"},
    {"id": "underworld_reform", "name": "地府改革", "desc": "（地府路线）修改生死簿，改变三界命运"},
    {"id": "buddha_rebellion", "name": "反出西天", "desc": "（西天路线）揭露如来布局真相，三界大乱"}
  ],

  "art_style": "journey_to_the_west_fairytale_classic",
  "art_direction": {
    "visual_style": "鲜亮、童话、朴素的经典西游记插画风，不走武侠修仙，不走厚重写实；更像老版西游记童话插图、少年读物封面、经典连环画神话场景",
    "color_palette": "明快高饱和：金黄、朱红、青绿、天蓝、乳白、暖橙；整体清透鲜亮，不灰暗不肃杀",
    "character_portraits": "神话人物造型夸张而亲切，线条干净，面相带童话感，服装与飘带简洁鲜明，云朵镶边、祥云纹、山石草木都带朴素装饰感",
    "battle_scenes": "热闹神话童话风，法宝飞舞但不过度爆炸化，云雾与金光偏装饰感，画面鲜亮、灵动、清楚，像经典西游记故事插图",
    "reference": ["《西游记》人民美术出版社版插图", "经典西游记童话插图", "86版西游记电视剧美术", "中国传统少儿神话绘本风格"]
  },

  "created": "2026-04-09",
  "version": "1.0.0"
}
